text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ouch... This feels like it might be bad news...
choice_data_list: Let's take the day off, then.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Take the day off? But...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Everyone else is training now.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Isn't there anything I can still do? I don't mind if
it's just some light exercises.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty durable, so doing a little bit of training
won't hurt me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...No dice, huh?
choice_data_list: I suppose you could do some walking...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...No dice, huh?
choice_data_list: I suppose you could do some walking...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ngh... You're right. I'll be patient, then.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Siiigh...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, time to change gears and my mindset! The
more I rest now, the faster I'll recover!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But wow, I had no idea the infirmary was this
quiet...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It's kinda lonely in here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black seems a little down as she buries
her head under her bedsheets.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Really?! Yesss!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Walking is good! I'll make sure only to walk! No
running for m—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's one of my classmates! Whoa, she's really
flying down the track! That looks so fun!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I've gotta hurry up and get better so I can
run like that again!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here I go! I've gotta keep doing whatever I
can!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black fumbles and trips, further worsening
her injury...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: One, two... One, two... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Taking things easy once in a while isn't so
bad! I'm usually way too strung up about things.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: This breeze is so nice, it makes me want to sing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Together we'll run for our dreeeam! ♪ We'll keep
winning, lalaaa lala la laaa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Turns out walking was what she needed and her
injury heals up nicely!
